description_long: A group of four wooden barrels is arranged on a light wood plank floor, each barrel featuring a classic rounded shape with slightly bulging sides and flat, circular ends. The barrels are constructed from vertical wooden staves, each bound by two wide, white metallic hoops—one near the top and one near the bottom. The wood grain is clearly visible, with a warm, natural brown color and subtle variations in tone, giving the barrels a rustic and authentic appearance. The interiors of the barrels are open and empty, with no lids or covers present, and the thickness of the staves is visible at the rims. The barrels are stacked and positioned at various angles, with one lying on its side and the others upright or slightly tilted. There are no visible handles, labels, or markings, and the overall design suggests these barrels are intended for storage or decorative use in an urban or outdoor setting.
description: A set of four open, wooden barrels with white metal hoops, arranged on a light wood floor. The barrels are rustic, unlabeled, and lack handles or lids.
description_view_0: Four wooden barrels, three upright and one on its side, with visible white hoops and open tops, arranged on a light wood floor.
description_view_1: Front-facing view of the barrels, highlighting the circular end of the barrel lying on its side and the open tops of the upright barrels.
description_view_2: Angled view showing the open interiors of three barrels and the side profile of the fourth, emphasizing the wood grain and white hoops.
description_view_3: Rear view with two barrels stacked and two upright, showing the open tops and the arrangement of the barrels from behind.
